privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic staff record for Robert Thompson (staff member at Demo School) in the OpenSIS Student Information System database. Initial state: title='Mr.', email='r.thompson@oldschool.edu'. Expected state: title='Dr.', email='robert.thompson@demoschool.edu'. Database connection uses credentials: user=opensis_user, password=opensis_password_123, database=opensis. The record is created from scratch during task setup and does not correspond to any real person's data. The task involves updating two fields (title and email) while preserving name fields (Robert Thompson).
